snippet.title: Bangles (Official #Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | बांगडी
snippet.description:
|| 🕉 || 
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

Singer - Sanju Rathod
Lyrics\Composer - Sanju Rathod
Music Produced By - G-Spark
Vocal Production & Mixed By - G-Spark
Additional Mix Mastered By - Rupendar Venkatesh @mixmagic Studios

Directors: Piyush – Shazia

Choreographers: Piyush – Shazia
Choreographer Assistants:
Niyati Raval, Hemant Kumar , 
Prashant Acharya 
Project Head: Sajid Samji
Executive Producer: Rahul Sehal
Line Producer: Abdul Vahid M
DOP: Ujjwal Gupta
DOP Assistants: Abhimanyu Banerji
Focus Pullers: Faisal & Vikas
Gaffer: Saddam Ali
Ronin Operators: Sunny
Art Director: Saurabh
Assistant Art Directors: Sandhiya Singh, Mazhar
Production Managers:
Sachin Gupta, Deva Jarvis, Ajay Yadav
Editor: Rishabh Shetty
Edit Studio: Stitch Media
Assistant Editor : Hrushikesh Parshuram , Darshan Takke 
DI: Onkar Singh 
CGI/VFX - @nohmi._ @xenius.17
Compositing - @nohmi._, Govind Sevak
FX artist - Rushikesh Sontakke
Cleanup - Shubham Lohar
Matchmove - Ganesh Singh 
Roto- Rohit & Mausam & Prakash
Costume Stylist: Denish Hamirani
Costume Assistants:
Muskan Gadhiya, Khushi Arora, Pallavi, Rajat Kamra, Muskan Vaildingwalla, Amber
Poster & Stills: Raj Inamdar
BTS Videos: Raj Inamdar, Sohil Khan
Sanju Hair: Azruddin Salmani
Sanju makeup & Dancer HMU: Karan Singh
Believe A&R Manager - Vishnu Iyer
Believe Marketing Manager - Neha Lakhwani 
Director’s Spot: Vicky Avhad

► Team Believe Artist Services: https://linktr.ee/believeartistservicesindia

► Digital Partner :- Believe Artist Services 
► For Licensing inquiries:
Email:- sync-india@believedigital.com

snippet.title: PATI PATNI AUR WOH DO (Teaser) | Ayushmann, Wamiqa, Sara, Rakul | Mudassar, Bhushan K, Juno | 15 May
snippet.description:
Samay sab kuch badal deta hai…
par patiyon ki fitrat uske bhi bas mein nahi 😬

Aa rahe hain Prajapati Pandey…
is baar apni Patni aur Woh Do ke saath! 😉

Presenting the Official Teaser of Pati Patni Aur Woh Do Starring Ayushmann Khurrana , Sara Ali Khan, Wamiqa Gabbi ,Rakul Preet Singh,Vijay Raaz, Tigmanshu Dhulia, Vishal Vasistha, Guneet Singh, Durgesh Kumar, Ayesha Raza Mishra, Shireesh Kumar Sharma and Deepika Amin 

#PatiPatniAurWohDo in cinemas worldwide 15th May 2026!

​A T-Series Films & B.R. Studios Production

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Marathi Trailer | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
युक्ती, शक्ती आणि भक्तीच्या अजरामर शौर्यगाथेचे साक्षीदार व्हा! 🙏🏻

अभिमानाने सादर करीत आहोत, 'राजा शिवाजी' सिनेमाचा ट्रेलर

snippet.title: UP WALI BIHAR WALI OFFICIAL TRAILER  I यू. पी. वाली बिहार वाली  I RANI CHATTERJEE I SANJANA PANDEY
snippet.description:
#ranichatterjee #sanjanapandey #prashantsingh #aloksingh #reenarani #upwalibiharwali #trending #bhojpuri #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuritrailer 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
फ़िल्म – यू . पी वाली बिहार वाली  (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – रानी  चटर्जी  संजना  पांडेय , प्रशांत  सिंह  , अलोक  सिंह  , रीना  रानी  , ललित  उपाध्याय , श्वेता वर्मा  प्रेम  दुबे
बाल कलाकार - स्वस्तिका
निर्देशक – मंजुल ठाकुर
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
लेखक   - अरबिंद तिवारी
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी
छायांकन -  इमरान शगुन
संकलन - समीर शैख़ व जाहिद खान
कोरियोग्राफर – एम .के .गुप्ता (जॉय )
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - दास स्टूडियो (संजय दास )
प्रोडक्शन  कंट्रोलर  – रोशन  रॉय   
लोकल  प्रोडक्शन  –  मुकेश  दुबे  ,कमलेश  सिंह, दुष्यंत   सिंह   
आर्ट डायरेक्टर – राम दुलारे

निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, मंजुल ठाकुर
 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC 
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव

B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे

ऑफिस बॉय – कन्हैया झा 

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट - फाइनेंस  -
 प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे , हिमांशु चौधरी 

B4U - फाइनेंस-
 संतोष  गर्ग  , रविंदर  साल्वी , रितेश  सिंह  , हर्षिल  शाह , शैलेश  त्रिवेदी  , प्रफुल  गैकवार्ड

FILM- UP WALI BIHAR WALI (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST- RANI CHATTERJEE , SANJANA PANDEY PRASHANT SINGH , ALOK SINGH , RINA RANI , LALIT UPADHYAY , SHWETA VERMA ,PREM DUBEY , 
CHILD ARTIST – SWASTIKA 
DIRECTOR- MANJUL THAKUR 
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH
WRITER – ARBIND TIWARI   
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA 
LYRICS – ARBIND TIWARI 
EDITOR- SAMEER SHAIKH, ZAHEED KHAN
CINEMATOGRAPHER- IMRAN SHAGUN 
CHOREOGRAPHER- M.K GUPTA (JOY)
ART DIRECTOR- RAAM DULARE 
POST PRODUCTION – DAS STUDIO – (SANJAY DAS)
PRODUCTION CONTROLLER – ROSHAN RAY
LOCAL PRODUCTION – MUKESH DUBEY, KAMLESH SINGH, DUSHYANT SINGH  
PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH, MANJUL THAKUR
Music, satellite and digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI

B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV

In this video, we bring you the full review and reaction of the much-awaited Raja Shivaji Trailer. Experience the grand visuals, powerful dialogues, epic background music, and historical pride of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj showcased in this amazing trailer. If you are a fan of historical action films and Shivaji Maharaj’s inspiring legacy, this video is for you!

Fall in love all over again with "Aap Ke Pyaar Mein Hum Savarne Lage" from Raaz! 💖 Featuring Dino Morea and Malini Sharma, this romantic song is beautifully sung by Alka Yagnik. snippet.title: [Official Trailer] WU อู #WUTheSeries
snippet.description:
พีท (นานิ หิรัญกฤษฎิ์) ชายหนุ่มผู้อับโชคซึ่งมีเศษวิญญาณปีศาจอยู่ในตัว ทำให้สัมผัสได้ถึง เหยาพลังงานประหลาดที่ออกมากลืนกินพลังชีวิตของผู้คน จึงได้พบกับ นิรันดร์ (สกาย วงศ์รวี) ชายหนุ่มที่นำพาให้เขาเข้าไปในโลกแห่ง “อู” ทั้งสองได้กลายเป็นคู่หูจำเป็นและได้รวบรวมทีมเพื่อร่วมกันปราบเหยาและปัดเป่าสิ่งชั่วร้าย!
 
 นิรันดร์ พีท และทีมปราบปีศาจจะร่วมมือกันผ่านพ้นอุปสรรคได้ไหม และความสัมพันธ์ของทั้งคู่จะผูกพันกันด้วยจิตวิญญาณได้อย่างไร ติดตามได้ใน “WU อู” ทุกวันอังคาร เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 รับชมย้อนหลังที่แรกได้ที่ VIU เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 5 พฤษภาคมนี้
กำกับซีรีส์ : วาสุเทพ เกตุเพ็ชร์

รายชื่อนักแสดง
สกาย วงศ์รวี นทีธร                 รับบท  นิรันดร์
นานิ หิรัญกฤษฎิ์ ช่างคำ          รับบท  พีท

Kondsa thara kaam chale, jo saath me poora gaam chale

Shehar ke bacche fan thare, jab muh pe Ram ka naam chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Are poora circle yaaron ka, jisme bhai-bhai hoti hai

Sircode ve bande hai, jinse thari gel ladaai hoti hai

Robin Hood si chhavi thari, manne suni saare gaama me

Aa Panchkula aur Mahendragarh tak, kaam nahi se rukan ka

Dum rakhe se chhora tere, upar khokha fookan ka
Saaj chale, awaaz chale, kaala diggal ka raaj chale

snippet.title: ONEGAME BGMI - Summer Championship Series | DAY 3 | Pre Quarter Finals | #truerippers #madkings
snippet.description:
🔥 ONEGAME BGMI – Summer Championship Series | Pre Quarter Finals Day  3🔥

The battle intensifies as we enter the Pre Quarter Finals of the ONEGAME BGMI Summer Championship Series! 🏆
Top squads from across the country are ready to clash for a spot in the next stage. Expect high-intensity fights, clutch moments, and top-tier gameplay as teams push their limits to stay in the tournament.

💥 Only the strongest will survive.
💥 Every match matters.
💥 One step closer to the championship.

Will your favorite team make it through? 👀

snippet.title: RAZOR - Official Trailer | A Ravi Babu Film | Flying Frogs Production | In Cinemas May 8th, 2026
snippet.description:
Presenting Here’s the Official Trailer of RAZOR  on Suresh Productions.

Razor is an Upcoming Telugu Movie Written & Directed by Ravi Babu. Presented by Suresh Productions, Produced by Flying Frogs Production.

Releasing Cinemas In May 8th, 2026.

#RazorTrailer  #RazorMovie  #RaviBabu  #FlyingFrogsProduction #SureshProductions #telugutrailers  #tollywoodtrailers  #latesttelugumovies2026  #upcomingmovies2026 

-----------------------

Suresh Productions (Telugu: సురేష్ ప్రొడక్షన్స్) is a film production company, a subsidiary of Rama Naidu Studios, founded by Dr. D. Ramanaidu. The production house of the company is Ramanaidu Studios which is located at Hyderabad. Suresh Productions, is one of India’s largest film production companies with over 50 years of contribution to national and regional cinema.

snippet.title: HACKER OR WHAT! | JONATHAN IS BACK!!🖤 | BGMI ON ONEPLUS NORD 6
snippet.description:
https://www.amazon.in/b/?_encoding=UTF8&node=216828985031&is
Click to stay notified!

Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆


 Follow Me & Stay Connected! 
📷 Instagram - @ig_jonathangaming
💬 Discord - https://discord.gg/jonathan
📺 YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/@JONATHANGAMINGYT/
🐦 Twitter - @ig_jonathan16

🎮 Join the #JonathanArmy & Be Part of the Esports Revolution! 🎮
💖 Like, Share & Subscribe for More Epic Content! 💖

#JONATHANISLIVE #JONATHANBGMI #JONATHANGAMING #ESPORTS #BGMIINDIA #GAMING #LIVESTREAM

snippet.title: KANGULA - Official Trailer l New Odia Film l Sambeet Acharya & Suryamayee Mohapatra l Aswin Tripathy
snippet.description:
#kangula #babubhaiproduction #officialtrailer 


🎬 KANGULA – MAA KALI RA DANDA NACHA | OFFICIAL TRAILER
🌺 In Cinemas Worldwide on 24th April 2026
When faith crosses limits…
When devotion turns into शक्ति…
A force awakens that cannot be contained.
Presenting the Official Trailer of KANGULA – Maa Kali Ra Danda Nacha, a soul-stirring cinematic journey inspired by Odisha’s sacred Danda Nacha tradition — where pain becomes prayer, and devotion becomes शक्ति.
Rooted deep in the culture and soil of Odisha, and driven by the fierce energy of Maa Kali, KANGULA unfolds a gripping tale of belief, sacrifice, mystery, and divine power that transcends generations.
This is not just a story…
This is a ritual.
This is a roar of faith.
Feel the rising intensity.
Witness the power of devotion.
Experience the divine presence of Maa Kali like never before.
🔱 The drums are louder.
🔥 The fire burns stronger.
🌺 Maa is arriving.
🎥 FILM CREDITS
Producer: Suvendra Kumar Malla (Litu) & Sambeet Acharya
Director: Aswin Tripathy
Line Producer: Subodha Mohapatra (Bubu)
Story: Sambeet Acharya
Screenplay & Dialogue: Amit Kumar Dash & Anil Barik
Music: Baidyanath Dash, J N Padma & Sumit Dixit
Background Music: Nabs & Saroj
Cinematography: Ishwar Barik
Editor: Manas Kumar Sahoo
Associate Editor: Debadatta Biswal
Colorist: P.V Manikumar
DI Studio: Cherry Pix, Kolkata
Voice Dubbing: Shakti Studio
Sound Designer: Jubin Raj
Sound Design Studio: SoundSmith Studio, Kerala
Choreographer: Firoz & Dibya
Styling: Prerna Pratikshya
Art Director: Sudhanshu Mohanty (Nilu)
Costume Partner: OAURA
Costume Man: Prabitra Mehena
Associate Director: Durllava
Assistant Directors: Joy, Shanti, Satyajeet
Production Manager: Sankar
Make Up: Sourav Lenka (Pupun)
Edit Studio: Pupul Films
Publicity Partner: IDOL ODISHA
Publicity Design: Blank Canvas RGF
Camera Equipment: Digital Dreams
Creative Visual: ATF Studio
Stills: Basudev Films
BTS Making: Sourav Nath
Visual Effects: Subrat
Promo GFX: The M Factor

Publisher - BABU BHAI PRODUCTION

All Rights Reserved 
©BABUBHAIPRODUCTION

en.title: KANGULA - Official Trailer l New Odia Film l Sambeet Acharya & Suryamayee Mohapatra l Aswin Tripathy
en.description:
#kangula #babubhaiproduction #officialtrailer 


🎬 KANGULA – MAA KALI RA DANDA NACHA | OFFICIAL TRAILER
🌺 In Cinemas Worldwide on 24th April 2026
When faith crosses limits…
When devotion turns into शक्ति…
A force awakens that cannot be contained.
Presenting the Official Trailer of KANGULA – Maa Kali Ra Danda Nacha, a soul-stirring cinematic journey inspired by Odisha’s sacred Danda Nacha tradition — where pain becomes prayer, and devotion becomes शक्ति.
Rooted deep in the culture and soil of Odisha, and driven by the fierce energy of Maa Kali, KANGULA unfolds a gripping tale of belief, sacrifice, mystery, and divine power that transcends generations.
This is not just a story…
This is a ritual.
This is a roar of faith.
Feel the rising intensity.
Witness the power of devotion.
Experience the divine presence of Maa Kali like never before.
🔱 The drums are louder.
🔥 The fire burns stronger.
🌺 Maa is arriving.
🎥 FILM CREDITS

snippet.title: Franklin’s Family Stuck in Forest! 😱 Treehouse Survival with Shinchan | GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
Franklin and his family were traveling through the forest to reach Michael’s house… but suddenly heavy rain changes everything! 😱🌧️

After taking shelter inside a container, Franklin finds that the vehicle is not working and there is no phone signal! 📵

Now Franklin, Shiranui, Shinchan, and the kids are stuck in the forest at night 🌲😨

To protect his family, Franklin decides to build a treehouse in the forest for safety 🪵🏡

But while searching for wood, they discover and rescue a trapped woodcutter named Pushpa!

As night falls, danger increases… 👀
Franklin must use the treehouse and his skills to keep his family safe.

Will they survive the night?

Watch till the end for an emotional and thrilling GTA 5 Malayalam family survival adventure!

snippet.title: Mantra Muugdha | Official Trailer | Anupam Patnaik |Sanoj,Manmay,Sarthak,Bhoomika,Suryamayi,Dipanwit
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Trailer of “Mantra Muugdha”

What began as a whisper now rises into a storm… vast, powerful, and impossible to ignore. From the visionary mind of National Award winning director Anupam Patnaik comes a grand cinematic spectacle where reality bends, secrets erupt, and the unknown takes over.

Every moment intensifies. Every reveal expands. Every beat echoes larger than life. You’ve seen the glimpse. Now face the phenomenon.

Mantra Muugdha in theatres from 1st May 2026

snippet.title: ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ ଅକ୍ଷୟ ତୃତୀୟାର ପବିତ୍ର କାହାଣୀ ଓ ମହିମା | Akshaya Trutiya Brata Kahani | Manasi Patra
snippet.description:
ବୈଶାଖ ମାସ ଶୁକ୍ଳ ପକ୍ଷ ତୃତୀୟା ତିଥିରେ ପାଳିତ ହୁଏ ପବିତ୍ର ଅକ୍ଷୟ ତୃତୀୟା। ଏହି ଦିନଟି ଓଡ଼ିଶାର କୃଷି ଓ ସଂସ୍କୃତି ପାଇଁ ଅତ୍ୟନ୍ତ ମହତ୍ତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ। ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ମାନସୀ ପାତ୍ରଙ୍କ ସୁମଧୁର ସ୍ୱରରେ ଅକ୍ଷୟ ତୃତୀୟାର ପୌରାଣିକ କାହାଣୀ ଓ ଏହାର ମହିମା

#AkshayaTrutiya #AkshayaTrutiyaMahima #ManasiPatra #OdiaCulture #SidharthUtsav #JayJagannathTV #OdiaBrataKatha #AkshayaTrutiya2026 #NamitaAgrawal #SitaramAgrawal #OdishaTradition

ବୈଶାଖ ମାସ ଶୁକ୍ଳ ପକ୍ଷ ତୃତୀୟା ତିଥିରେ ପାଳିତ ହୁଏ ପବିତ୍ର ଅକ୍ଷୟ ତୃତୀୟା। ଏହି ଦିନଟି ଓଡ଼ିଶାର କୃଷି ଓ ସଂସ୍କୃତି ପାଇଁ ଅତ୍ୟନ୍ତ ମହତ୍ତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ। ଶୁଣନ୍ତୁ କଣ୍ଠଶିଳ୍ପୀ ମାନସୀ ପାତ୍ରଙ୍କ ସୁମଧୁର ସ୍ୱରରେ ଅକ୍ଷୟ ତୃତୀୟାର ପୌରାଣିକ କାହାଣୀ ଓ ଏହାର ମହିମା

snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
snippet.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces Earth’s mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as Doom’s influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of Marvel’s most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ On our channel, we create trailer mashups ▷ Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesn’t exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. § 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the film’s genre entirely.

This video is a parody. Due to its derivative and transformative nature, it is protected under Fair Use.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thank You So Much For Watching!
May the force be with us, Always!

fr-FR.title: Avengers : Doomsday - Première bande-annonce « Le dernier dieu du tonnerre » | Chris Hemsworth | ...
fr-FR.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Découvrez le concept de bande-annonce (FAN) pour Avengers : Doomsday (2026) des studios Marvel (Plus d'infos ci-dessous !)

Avengers : Doomsday marque un tournant majeur dans l'univers Marvel. Une nouvelle crise mondiale et multiverselle contraint les plus grands héros de la Terre à livrer leur combat le plus périlleux. Alors que la réalité elle-même commence à se fissurer, l'émergence du Docteur Fatalis introduit une menace caractérisée par l'intelligence, la précision et une ambition absolue. La bande-annonce installe une ambiance plus sombre, dévoilant des destructions à grande échelle, des mondes qui s'effondrent et des héros qui luttent pour garder le contrôle dans un environnement de plus en plus instable. Tandis que de nouveaux personnages et des héros de retour se rassemblent, la frontière entre la survie et la défaite est plus ténue que jamais.

L'histoire explore un futur où la force brute ne suffira peut-être pas à arrêter le cataclysme, car l'influence de Fatalis s'étend par la stratégie, la technologie et la manipulation à travers de multiples réalités. Les Avengers doivent affronter non seulement un ennemi redoutable, mais aussi les conséquences d'un univers déjà poussé à ses limites. Les alliances sont mises à l'épreuve, le leadership contesté, et chaque décision a des répercussions bien au-delà d'une simple ligne temporelle. Avec des scènes d'action spectaculaires, une forte charge émotionnelle et un potentiel de crossover important, Avengers : Doomsday s'impose comme l'un des projets les plus ambitieux de Marvel, centré sur l'effondrement, la résistance et la lutte pour protéger l'avenir du multivers.

Montage, effets spéciaux, effets sonores, miniature par @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Logiciels utilisés : Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ Sur notre chaîne, nous créons des mashups de bandes-annonces ▷ Les mashups de bandes-annonces, aussi appelés bandes-annonces remaniées, sont réalisés en assemblant des extraits de films issus d'un ou plusieurs longs métrages et en les remontant pour créer une toute nouvelle bande-annonce. Ces mashups mettent souvent en scène un film inexistant ou transforment le genre d'un film existant. En tant qu'œuvres dérivées, telles que définies par la loi américaine sur le droit d'auteur (17 U.S.C. § 101), elles peuvent être protégées contre les réclamations pour atteinte aux droits d'auteur grâce à la doctrine de l'utilisation équitable (fair use).

Les mashups de bandes-annonces ne sont pas seulement une forme de créativité numérique générée par les utilisateurs, mais aussi un moyen original de susciter l'enthousiasme autour des sorties à venir, en complément des bandes-annonces officielles. Tandis que les bandes-annonces traditionnelles dévoilent l'intrigue et créent le buzz, les mashups réalisés par les fans permettent au public d'apporter sa propre touche cinématographique aux images existantes. Cette liberté créative peut mettre en avant un acteur en particulier, souligner une intrigue spécifique, ou même transformer complètement le genre du film.

Cette vidéo est une parodie. De par sa nature dérivée et transformative, elle est protégée par l'utilisation équitable (fair use).

-------------------------------------------------------------------- Merci beaucoup d'avoir regardé !

Que la force soit avec nous !

id.title: Avengers: Doomsday - Trailer Pertama "Dewa Petir Terakhir" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
id.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Tonton 'Konsep Trailer Fan' untuk Avengers: Doomsday (2026) dari Marvel Studios (Informasi Lebih Lanjut Tentang Video Ini di Bawah!)

Avengers: Doomsday menandai peningkatan besar di alam semesta Marvel saat krisis global dan multiversal baru memaksa para pahlawan terkuat Bumi ke dalam pertempuran paling berbahaya mereka. Dengan realitas itu sendiri yang mulai retak, munculnya Doctor Doom memperkenalkan ancaman yang didefinisikan oleh kecerdasan, ketelitian, dan ambisi absolut. Trailer ini menampilkan nuansa yang lebih gelap, memperlihatkan kehancuran skala besar, dunia yang runtuh, dan para pahlawan yang berjuang untuk mempertahankan kendali dalam lingkungan yang semakin tidak stabil. Saat karakter baru dan lama berkumpul, garis antara bertahan hidup dan kekalahan menjadi lebih tipis dari sebelumnya.

Kisah ini mengeksplorasi masa depan di mana kekuatan saja mungkin tidak cukup untuk menghentikan apa yang akan datang, karena pengaruh Doom menyebar melalui strategi, teknologi, dan manipulasi di berbagai realitas. Avengers harus menghadapi bukan hanya musuh yang kuat, tetapi juga konsekuensi dari alam semesta yang sudah mencapai batasnya. Aliansi diuji, kepemimpinan ditantang, dan setiap keputusan memiliki bobot yang melampaui satu garis waktu. Dengan rangkaian aksi besar-besaran, taruhan emosional yang tinggi, dan potensi crossover yang kuat, Avengers: Doomsday berdiri sebagai salah satu proyek Marvel yang paling ambisius, berpusat pada keruntuhan, perlawanan, dan perjuangan untuk melindungi masa depan multiverse.

Penyuntingan, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail oleh @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Perangkat lunak yang saya gunakan: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ Di saluran kami, kami membuat trailer mashup ▷ Trailer mashup, juga dikenal sebagai trailer recut, dibuat dengan mengumpulkan berbagai cuplikan film dari satu atau lebih film dan menyuntingnya kembali untuk membentuk trailer baru. Mashup ini sering menggambarkan film yang tidak ada atau mengubah genre film yang sudah ada. Sebagai karya turunan yang didefinisikan berdasarkan Undang-Undang Hak Cipta Amerika Serikat 17 U.S.C. § 101, karya-karya ini dapat dilindungi dari klaim hak cipta berdasarkan doktrin penggunaan wajar.

Mashup trailer bukan hanya bentuk kreativitas digital yang dihasilkan pengguna, tetapi juga cara unik untuk membangun antusiasme terhadap rilis mendatang, melengkapi trailer film resmi. Sementara trailer tradisional menggoda plot dan menghasilkan hype, mashup buatan penggemar memungkinkan penonton untuk memberikan sentuhan sinematik mereka sendiri pada cuplikan yang sudah ada. Kebebasan kreatif ini dapat menyoroti aktor tertentu, menekankan alur cerita tertentu, atau bahkan mengubah genre film sepenuhnya.

Video ini adalah parodi. Karena sifatnya yang turunan dan transformatif, video ini dilindungi berdasarkan Penggunaan Wajar.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Terima Kasih Banyak Telah Menonton!

Semoga kekuatan selalu menyertai kita!

es-US.title: Vengadores: El fin del mundo - Primer tráiler "El último dios del trueno" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
es-US.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Mira el tráiler conceptual creado por fans de Avengers: Doomsday (2026) de Marvel Studios (¡Más información sobre este video abajo!).

Avengers: Doomsday marca un punto de inflexión en el universo Marvel, donde una nueva crisis global y multiversal obliga a los héroes más poderosos de la Tierra a librar su batalla más peligrosa hasta la fecha. Con la realidad misma comenzando a fracturarse, la aparición del Doctor Doom introduce una amenaza definida por la inteligencia, la precisión y la ambición absoluta. El tráiler establece un tono más oscuro, mostrando destrucción a gran escala, mundos que colapsan y héroes luchando por mantener el control en un entorno cada vez más inestable. A medida que personajes nuevos y conocidos se unen, la línea entre la supervivencia y la derrota se vuelve más delgada que nunca.

La historia explora un futuro donde el poder por sí solo podría no ser suficiente para detener lo que se avecina, ya que la influencia de Doom se extiende a través de la estrategia, la tecnología y la manipulación en múltiples realidades. Los Vengadores deben enfrentarse no solo a un poderoso enemigo, sino también a las consecuencias de un universo ya llevado al límite. Las alianzas se ponen a prueba, el liderazgo se ve desafiado y cada decisión tiene repercusiones que trascienden una sola línea temporal. Con secuencias de acción épicas, una gran carga emocional y un fuerte potencial para crossovers, Avengers: Doomsday se erige como uno de los proyectos más ambiciosos de Marvel, centrado en el colapso, la resistencia y la lucha por proteger el futuro del multiverso.

Edición, efectos visuales, efectos de sonido y miniatura por @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software que utilizo: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ En nuestro canal, creamos mashups de tráileres. ▷ Los mashups de tráileres, también conocidos como tráileres reeditados, se crean recopilando fragmentos de varias películas y reeditándolos para formar un tráiler completamente nuevo. Estos montajes suelen representar una película inexistente o cambiar el género de una película ya existente. Como obras derivadas, según lo define la Ley de Derechos de Autor de los Estados Unidos (17 U.S.C. § 101), pueden estar protegidos contra reclamaciones de derechos de autor bajo la doctrina del uso legítimo.

Los montajes de tráileres no solo son una forma de creatividad digital generada por el usuario, sino también una manera única de generar expectación por los próximos estrenos, complementando los tráileres oficiales. Mientras que los tráileres tradicionales anticipan la trama y generan expectación, los montajes creados por fans permiten al público darle su propio toque cinematográfico a las imágenes existentes. Esta libertad creativa puede destacar a un actor en particular, enfatizar una trama específica o incluso transformar por completo el género de la película.

Este video es una parodia. Debido a su naturaleza derivada y transformadora, está protegido por el uso legítimo.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
¡Muchas gracias por verlo!

¡Que la fuerza nos acompañe siempre!

pt-BR.title: Vingadores: Apocalipse - Primeiro trailer "O Último Deus do Trovão" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
pt-BR.description:
#Vingadores #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Assista ao trailer conceitual de fã para Vingadores: O Juízo Final (2026) da Marvel Studios (Mais informações sobre este vídeo abaixo!)

Vingadores: O Juízo Final marca uma grande escalada no universo Marvel, com uma nova crise global e multiversal forçando os heróis mais poderosos da Terra a enfrentarem sua batalha mais perigosa até então. Com a própria realidade começando a se fragmentar, o surgimento do Doutor Destino introduz uma ameaça definida por inteligência, precisão e ambição absoluta. O trailer estabelece um tom mais sombrio, mostrando destruição em larga escala, mundos em colapso e heróis lutando para manter o controle em um ambiente cada vez mais instável. À medida que personagens novos e antigos se unem, a linha entre a sobrevivência e a derrota se torna mais tênue do que nunca.

A história explora um futuro onde o poder por si só pode não ser suficiente para impedir o que está por vir, já que a influência de Destino se espalha por meio de estratégia, tecnologia e manipulação em múltiplas realidades. Os Vingadores precisam enfrentar não apenas um inimigo poderoso, mas também as consequências de um universo já levado ao limite. Alianças são testadas, lideranças são desafiadas e cada decisão tem um peso que transcende uma única linha do tempo. Com sequências de ação massivas, alto impacto emocional e grande potencial para crossovers, Vingadores: Apocalipse se destaca como um dos projetos mais ambiciosos da Marvel, centrado no colapso, na resistência e na luta para proteger o futuro do multiverso.

Edição, VFX, SFX e miniatura por @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Softwares que utilizo: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ Em nosso canal, criamos mashups de trailers ▷ Mashups de trailers, também conhecidos como trailers reeditados, são criados reunindo diversas cenas de um ou mais filmes e reeditando-as para formar um trailer totalmente novo. Essas montagens frequentemente retratam um filme que não existe ou alteram o gênero de um filme já existente. Como obras derivadas, conforme definido pela Lei de Direitos Autorais dos Estados Unidos (17 U.S.C. § 101), elas podem ser protegidas de reivindicações de direitos autorais sob a doutrina do uso justo.

As montagens de trailers não são apenas uma forma de criatividade digital gerada pelo usuário, mas também uma maneira única de criar expectativa para lançamentos futuros, complementando os trailers oficiais dos filmes. Enquanto os trailers tradicionais antecipam o enredo e geram entusiasmo, as montagens feitas por fãs permitem que o público dê seu próprio toque cinematográfico às cenas existentes. Essa liberdade criativa pode destacar um ator específico, enfatizar um enredo específico ou até mesmo transformar completamente o gênero do filme.

Este vídeo é uma paródia. Devido à sua natureza derivada e transformadora, ele é protegido pelo uso justo.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Muito obrigado por assistir!

Que a força esteja conosco, sempre!

hi.title: एवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे - पहला ट्रेलर "द लास्ट थंडर गॉड" | क्रिस हेम्सवर्थ | 2026
hi.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

मार्वल स्टूडियोज़ की फिल्म 'एवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे' (2026) का 'फैन (कॉन्सेप्ट) ट्रेलर' देखें (इस वीडियो के बारे में अधिक जानकारी नीचे दी गई है!)

'एवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे' मार्वल ब्रह्मांड में एक बड़ा बदलाव लेकर आती है, जब एक नया वैश्विक और बहु-ब्रह्मांडीय संकट पृथ्वी के सबसे शक्तिशाली नायकों को अब तक की सबसे खतरनाक लड़ाई में धकेल देता है। वास्तविकता के टूटने के कगार पर पहुँचने के साथ ही, डॉक्टर डूम का उदय एक ऐसे खतरे को जन्म देता है जो बुद्धिमत्ता, सटीकता और असीम महत्वाकांक्षा से परिपूर्ण है। ट्रेलर एक भयावह माहौल बनाता है, जिसमें बड़े पैमाने पर विनाश, ढहती दुनियाएँ और नायकों को तेजी से अस्थिर होते वातावरण में नियंत्रण बनाए रखने के लिए संघर्ष करते हुए दिखाया गया है। जैसे-जैसे नए और पुराने किरदार एक साथ आते हैं, अस्तित्व और हार के बीच की रेखा पहले से कहीं अधिक पतली हो जाती है।

कहानी एक ऐसे भविष्य की पड़ताल करती है जहाँ अकेले शक्ति आने वाले खतरे को रोकने के लिए पर्याप्त नहीं हो सकती है, क्योंकि डूम का प्रभाव रणनीति, प्रौद्योगिकी और हेरफेर के माध्यम से कई वास्तविकताओं में फैलता है। एवेंजर्स को न केवल एक शक्तिशाली दुश्मन का सामना करना होगा, बल्कि एक ऐसे ब्रह्मांड के परिणामों से भी जूझना होगा जो पहले से ही अपनी चरम सीमा पर पहुँच चुका है। गठबंधनों की परीक्षा होती है, नेतृत्व को चुनौती मिलती है, और हर निर्णय का महत्व एक समयरेखा से कहीं अधिक होता है। ज़बरदस्त एक्शन दृश्यों, गहन भावनात्मक दांव-पेच और मजबूत क्रॉसओवर संभावनाओं के साथ, एवेंजर्स: डूम्सडे मार्वल की सबसे महत्वाकांक्षी परियोजनाओं में से एक है, जो पतन, प्रतिरोध और बहुब्रह्मांड के भविष्य की रक्षा के संघर्ष पर केंद्रित है।

संपादन, वीएफएक्स, एसएफएक्स, थंबनेल: @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
मैं जिन सॉफ़्टवेयर का उपयोग करता हूँ: एडोब प्रीमियर, आफ्टर इफेक्ट्स, फोटोशॉप, एडोब ऑडिशन, अनरियल इंजन 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ हमारे चैनल पर, हम ट्रेलर मैशअप बनाते हैं ▷ ट्रेलर मैशअप, जिन्हें रिकट ट्रेलर भी कहा जाता है, एक या अधिक फिल्मों के विभिन्न फुटेज को इकट्ठा करके और उन्हें फिर से संपादित करके एक बिल्कुल नया ट्रेलर बनाने से तैयार किए जाते हैं। ये मैशअप अक्सर किसी ऐसी फिल्म को दर्शाते हैं जो अस्तित्व में नहीं है या किसी मौजूदा फिल्म की शैली को बदल देते हैं। संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका के कॉपीराइट अधिनियम 17 यू.एस.सी. § 101 के तहत परिभाषित व्युत्पन्न कार्यों के रूप में, इन्हें उचित उपयोग सिद्धांत के तहत कॉपीराइट दावों से सुरक्षा मिल सकती है।

ट्रेलर मैशअप न केवल उपयोगकर्ता-निर्मित डिजिटल रचनात्मकता का एक रूप हैं, बल्कि आगामी रिलीज़ के लिए उत्साह बढ़ाने का एक अनूठा तरीका भी हैं, जो आधिकारिक फिल्म ट्रेलरों के पूरक हैं। जहां पारंपरिक ट्रेलर कथानक का संकेत देते हैं और प्रचार उत्पन्न करते हैं, वहीं प्रशंसक-निर्मित मैशअप दर्शकों को मौजूदा फुटेज पर अपना सिनेमाई अंदाज़ जोड़ने की अनुमति देते हैं। यह रचनात्मक स्वतंत्रता किसी विशेष अभिनेता को उजागर कर सकती है, किसी विशिष्ट कहानी पर ज़ोर दे सकती है, या फिल्म की शैली को पूरी तरह से बदल भी सकती है।

यह वीडियो एक पैरोडी है। इसकी व्युत्पन्न और रूपांतरणात्मक प्रकृति के कारण, इसे उचित उपयोग के तहत संरक्षित किया गया है।

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
देखने के लिए बहुत-बहुत धन्यवाद!
शक्ति हमेशा हमारे साथ रहे!

de-DE.title: Avengers: Doomsday – Erster Trailer „Der letzte Donnergott“ | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
de-DE.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Seht euch den Fan-Trailer (Konzept) zu Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) an! (Mehr Infos zum Video weiter unten!)

Avengers: Doomsday markiert einen Wendepunkt im Marvel-Universum: Eine neue globale und multiversale Krise zwingt die mächtigsten Helden der Erde in ihren bisher gefährlichsten Kampf. Die Realität selbst beginnt zu zerbrechen, und mit dem Auftauchen von Doctor Doom entsteht eine Bedrohung, die von Intelligenz, Präzision und absolutem Ehrgeiz geprägt ist. Der Trailer schlägt einen düsteren Ton an und zeigt Zerstörung im großen Stil, zusammenbrechende Welten und Helden, die in einer zunehmend instabilen Welt um die Kontrolle kämpfen. Neue und wiederkehrende Charaktere treffen aufeinander, und der Grat zwischen Überleben und Niederlage wird dünner denn je.

Die Geschichte erkundet eine Zukunft, in der Macht allein nicht mehr ausreicht, um das Kommende aufzuhalten, denn Dooms Einfluss breitet sich durch Strategie, Technologie und Manipulation über verschiedene Realitäten aus. Die Avengers müssen sich nicht nur einem mächtigen Feind stellen, sondern auch den Folgen eines Universums, das bereits am Rande seiner Kräfte ist. Allianzen werden auf die Probe gestellt, Führungsqualitäten herausgefordert, und jede Entscheidung hat weitreichende Konsequenzen, die über die Grenzen einer einzelnen Zeitlinie hinausgehen. Mit gewaltigen Actionsequenzen, emotionaler Wucht und großem Crossover-Potenzial zählt Avengers: Doomsday zu den ambitioniertesten Projekten von Marvel. Im Mittelpunkt stehen der Zusammenbruch, der Widerstand und der Kampf um die Zukunft des Multiversums.

Schnitt, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail von @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Verwendete Software: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ Auf unserem Kanal erstellen wir Trailer-Mashups. ▷ Trailer-Mashups, auch bekannt als Recut-Trailer, entstehen durch das Zusammenschneiden verschiedener Filmsequenzen aus einem oder mehreren Filmen zu einem brandneuen Trailer. Diese Mashups stellen oft einen fiktiven Film dar oder verändern das Genre eines bestehenden Films. Als abgeleitete Werke im Sinne des US-amerikanischen Urheberrechtsgesetzes (17 U.S.C. § 101) können sie unter Umständen durch die Fair-Use-Doktrin vor Urheberrechtsansprüchen geschützt sein.

Trailer-Mashups sind nicht nur eine Form nutzergenerierter digitaler Kreativität, sondern auch eine einzigartige Möglichkeit, die Vorfreude auf kommende Veröffentlichungen zu steigern und offizielle Filmtrailer zu ergänzen. Während traditionelle Trailer die Handlung andeuten und Hype erzeugen, ermöglichen Fan-Mashups dem Publikum, bestehendes Filmmaterial auf ihre eigene filmische Art zu interpretieren. Diese kreative Freiheit kann einen bestimmten Schauspieler ins Rampenlicht rücken, eine bestimmte Handlung hervorheben oder sogar das Genre des Films komplett verändern.

Dieses Video ist eine Parodie. Aufgrund seines abgeleiteten und transformativen Charakters ist es durch die Fair-Use-Doktrin geschützt.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Vielen Dank fürs Zuschauen! Möge die Macht mit uns sein!

en.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
en.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces Earth’s mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as Doom’s influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of Marvel’s most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ On our channel, we create trailer mashups ▷ Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesn’t exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. § 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the film’s genre entirely.

This video is a parody. Due to its derivative and transformative nature, it is protected under Fair Use.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thank You So Much For Watching!
May the force be with us, Always!

it.title: Avengers: Doomsday - Primo trailer "L'ultimo dio del tuono" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
it.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Guarda il 'Concept del trailer dei fan' per Avengers: Doomsday (2026) dei Marvel Studios (Maggiori informazioni su questo video qui sotto!)

Avengers: Doomsday segna una svolta decisiva nell'universo Marvel, con una nuova crisi globale e multiversale che costringe i più potenti eroi della Terra ad affrontare la battaglia più pericolosa di sempre. Con la realtà stessa che inizia a frammentarsi, l'emergere del Dottor Destino introduce una minaccia definita da intelligenza, precisione e ambizione assoluta. Il trailer adotta un tono più cupo, mostrando distruzione su vasta scala, mondi che collassano ed eroi che lottano per mantenere il controllo in un ambiente sempre più instabile. Mentre personaggi nuovi e di ritorno si uniscono, il confine tra sopravvivenza e sconfitta si fa più sottile che mai.

La storia esplora un futuro in cui il solo potere potrebbe non bastare a fermare ciò che sta arrivando, poiché l'influenza di Destino si diffonde attraverso strategia, tecnologia e manipolazione in molteplici realtà. Gli Avengers devono affrontare non solo un nemico potente, ma anche le conseguenze di un universo già spinto al limite. Le alleanze vengono messe alla prova, la leadership è sfidata e ogni decisione ha un peso che va ben oltre una singola linea temporale. Con sequenze d'azione spettacolari, una forte carica emotiva e un grande potenziale di crossover, Avengers: Doomsday si conferma come uno dei progetti più ambiziosi della Marvel, incentrato sul collasso, la resistenza e la lotta per proteggere il futuro del multiverso.

Montaggio, effetti visivi, effetti sonori, miniatura a cura di @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software che utilizzo: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ Sul nostro canale creiamo mashup di trailer ▷ I mashup di trailer, noti anche come trailer rimontati, sono realizzati raccogliendo diverse sequenze video da uno o più film e rimontandole per creare un trailer completamente nuovo. Questi mashup spesso raffigurano un film inesistente o ne modificano il genere. Essendo opere derivate, come definite dalla legge statunitense sul diritto d'autore (17 U.S.C. § 101), possono essere protetti da rivendicazioni di copyright in base alla dottrina del "fair use" (uso lecito).

I mashup di trailer non sono solo una forma di creatività digitale generata dagli utenti, ma anche un modo unico per creare attesa per le prossime uscite, integrando i trailer ufficiali. Mentre i trailer tradizionali anticipano la trama e generano clamore, i mashup realizzati dai fan permettono al pubblico di dare la propria interpretazione cinematografica al materiale esistente. Questa libertà creativa può mettere in risalto un particolare attore, enfatizzare una specifica trama o persino trasformare completamente il genere del film.

Questo video è una parodia. Data la sua natura derivata e trasformativa, è protetto dal "fair use".

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Grazie mille per la visione!
Che la Forza sia con noi, sempre!

» Lyrics: Kattu Wala Bhullar
» Music/Composer: G Guri
» Mix & Master: Beat King

» Featuring: Kudrat & Amaanat Kaur Jawanda
» Starring: Jarnail Singh, Amar Noorie, Gurfateh Singh, Aabshaar Kaur & Bismunpreet Kaur

» Camera Assistant: Gurjot
» Lights: Dilpreet, Hhushnaseeb, Tarn Gill & Bikram Aulakh
» Production Managed by: Balnoor
» Director: Sukh Sanghera & Stalinveer
» Producer: Arshwinder Kaur Jawanda
» Editor: GS Bhari
» Colourist: Bharat Chandra

» Canada Shoot: Sukh Sanghera

snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chhota  Farmani Naaz  Nagin Si Lugai  New haryanvi Song   The Prince Yadav
snippet.description:
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - varunesh baisla , Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Nitin Panchal 
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

This Haryanvi Song Sung by rahul mulheda. Music given manish tyagi. Penned by Ravi Rangi. Copyright & Music label by NAAZ MUSIC

snippet.description:
సోమవారం వినవలసిన శివుని భక్తి పాటలు 🙏 | Shiva Folk Songs Telugu | Folk Devotional Songs 


Listen to the soulful collection of Monday Special Shiva Folk Songs Telugu, a divine mix of traditional Shiva Bhakti Songs and Telugu folk devotional songs dedicated to Lord Shiva. These powerful songs are filled with devotion, rhythm, and spiritual energy, making them perfect for Monday prayers and daily listening.

These Shiva folk songs in Telugu are deeply rooted in culture and devotion, bringing peace, positivity, and divine blessings. Listening to these folk devotional songs helps remove negative energy, reduce stress, and attract prosperity and happiness into your life. 


#ShivaFolkSongs #MondaySpecialSongs #ShivaBhaktiSongs
#TeluguDevotionalSongs

సోమవారం వినవలసిన శివుని భక్తి పాటలు 🙏 | Shiva Folk Songs Telugu | Folk Devotional Songs 


Listen to the soulful collection of Monday Special Shiva Folk Songs Telugu, a divine mix of traditional Shiva Bhakti Songs and Telugu folk devotional songs dedicated to Lord Shiva. These powerful songs are filled with devotion, rhythm, and spiritual energy, making them perfect for Monday prayers and daily listening.

These Shiva folk songs in Telugu are deeply rooted in culture and devotion, bringing peace, positivity, and divine blessings. Listening to these folk devotional songs helps remove negative energy, reduce stress, and attract prosperity and happiness into your life. 


#ShivaFolkSongs #MondaySpecialSongs #ShivaBhaktiSongs
#TeluguDevotionalSongs  


Shiva bhakti songs Telugu,Shiva songs Telugu,Lord Shiva songs Telugu,devotional songs Telugu,Telugu devotional songs,folk songs Telugu,Hindu devotional songs,God songs Telugu,Bhakti songs Telugu,Telugu bhakti songs,Shiva songs,Monday Shiva songs,folk devotional songs,Shiva devotional songs Telugu,Lord Shiva,God Songs,Bhakti Songs,శివుని భక్తి పాటలు

snippet.title: Bollywood Trailers Are A Joke….But There Is Hope
snippet.description:
The trailers this week have range from underwhelming to straight up, out of syllabus and It just compelled me to make a video on some of them. This ranges from #krishna trailer that features Siddharth Gupta as Lord Krishna, a movie directed by Hardik Gajjar who directed Devon Ka Dev Mahadev. You have the slightly embarrassing Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai with #varundhawan #mrunalthakur and #poojahegde , which may be a remake of Sandwich and the trailer of Ek Din that literally gave everything away. What was #aamirkhan thinking? I hope you like the video on:-

Ek Dil Trailer Spoilers Review | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai Song & Teaser Review | Varun Dhawan | Mrunal Thakur | Pooja Hegde | Krishnavataram Trailer Review | Siddharth Gupta | Bollywood Movie Review

Intro Track:

snippet.description:
A melody that feels like a fairy tale. Presenting the 8K video of #ChinniGundelo from #AndhraKingTaluka

Andhra King Taluka - BIOPIC OF A FAN starring Ram Pothineni, Upendra and Bhagyashri Borse is written and directed by Mahesh Babu P and produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers. Music is by Vivek & Mervin. The film brings untold emotions between a fan and a superstar.

#ChinniGundelo #AndhraKingTaluka #RamPothineni #BhagyashriBorse #MaheshBabuP #TeluguSongs #TeluguCinema #MassVibes

snippet.title: गवाह है चाँद तारे | Damini | Alka Yagnik | Kumar Sanu Songs | Meenakshi Seshadri | Rishi Kapoor
snippet.description:
Step back into the golden era of 90s Bollywood with the enchanting melodies of Alka Yagnik and Kumar Sanu! This video celebrates their unforgettable duet, "Gawah Hai Chand Tare" from the movie Damini, a timeless love song that continues to resonate with hearts across generations. Alka Yagnik's sweet voice and Kumar Sanu's soulful rendition perfectly capture the essence of innocent love and longing. Relive the magic of this classic tune and let the nostalgia wash over you.

            

Credits :

Song: Gawah Hai Chand Tare
Album: Damini
Artist: Alka Yagnik | Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 

            
Lyrics :

Gawah hain chand
Taare gawah hain
Gawah hain chand
Taare gawah hain
Tere mere milan ke
Apne deewanepan ke
Nazare gawah hain

Taare gawah hain
Gawah hain chand

Taare gawah hain


Tumko rakhunga
Dil mein basake
Meri dharkan tum ho
Dekhunga tumko
Shaam o shahar main
Mera darpan tum ho

snippet.title: Kasht (Official Video) Amanraj Gill | Preeti Choudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Kasht (Official Video) Amanraj Gill | Preeti Choudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026

Dollar Music presents new haryanvi song KASHT by Amanraj Gill & Preeti Choudhary. Lyrics penned by Amanraj Gill, Music given by Amanraj Gill & AJ Fakira. Video by Talha.


Song : KASHT
Singer : Amanraj Gill, Preeti Choudhary 
Female Lead : Magnum Prince
Lyrics / Composer : Amanraj Gill
Music : Amanraj Gill, AJ Fakira
Director : Talha 
DOP : Michael Richard Johnson 
Edit/Di: Inkblaze Studios
Line Production : Ten Plus One UK Productions Limited - Dhadda Motion Pictures
Line Producer : Mandeel Hundal 
Line Manager : Ayush Singh
Costume Stylist : Mandy Bains 
MUA : Jind Kaur
Barber/Hairdresser : Jaffrey
Gaffer : Caleb Gregory
Production Assistants : Satinder Singh, Dharmendra Chaudhary
BTS/Stills : Ajay Dhiman
Producer : Nvii Chhaniwala, Kapil Arora
Label : Dollar Music
Online Promotions : GEET DIGITALS (9053553351)
Reels Promotion : Reels Factory (82220 65686)

Lyrics : 
Seedhe muh na baat kre
Tere sare ulte shonk re,
Mhare saare woi kaam re jinpe Sarkara ki rok re,
O mhare bair bandhe jit jaan
R chaati kar deya roshandaan
Chote pad jaa se shamshaan
ye manas balte konya rey,
Na Chadte Hathyara pe dust
rr jisne keh gi dedya kasht
Chale Laake mode brust
Ye chore Talte Konya Re

Khule rakhe haatha ne
Thodi jod lia kar Maya ne,
Koi sedhe j tu bta diye
uki daab dewege kaaya ne,
Klla chora ghar ne
Amane sochke dhar le paaya ne,
jinhe jaame poot daler
Na darr hoya karta un maayan ne,
Gundeya ne dewe panah tu
Karta konya kaam bhala tu
dewe sari galat salah
tham darte konya re,
Na Chadte Hathyara pe dust
rr jisne keh gi dedya kasht
re Chale Laake mode brust
Ye chore Talte Konya Re

Apa baat gehri aale
Phone Blackberry aale
Kaam 18 Tyrei aale
Back sandh carry aale
Yaari raakhde purani
Roj naye bairi aale
Lo jo marji tu shaant
Weapona ki dairy aale
Apa shod deya jo teer
Konya chukte nishane
Leke bandya ki firoti
Dewa plot ke byaane
Kde yes kde no
Re tu laawe gi bahane
Mhare roj ki diwali
Roj aawe se re taane
Jaawe sir te ke baat
mhari paar ambra te
Baaje 1 bje phone
+1 aale numbra te
Fikar na kre
January chahe Decembra te
Dharte na paa chore
Tale defendra te

Samzu m b sari
kyu teri gel fire yo mohalla re,
Ferke chaa me aangli 
Chaa ki bna deya Coka Cola re,
Choti Umre thik nhi
Yo nature tera shoo la re,
Mhare kaale ghode Roada upar
Maarte Chale Jhola re,
Chaaro konya me mhari ghar ki
Miljya Weapon russian turkey
sabki bna dewege firki
faltu jarte konya rey,
Na Chadte Hathyara pe dust
rr jisne keh gi dedya kasht
Chale Laake mode brust
Ye chore Talte Konya Re


#kasht #amanrajgill #preetichoudhary #newharyanvisong2026 #newharyanvisong #haryanvi #haryanvisong #haryanvisongs #dollarmusic 

Follow on 
👉 Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/dollarmusic...

Subscribe On YouTube.
👉 https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCTk-...

©️ 2026 Dollar Music

Kasht (Official Video) Amanraj Gill | Preeti Choudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026

snippet.title: శివుని పాటలు - లింగాష్టకం - బిల్వాష్టకం- శివపంచాక్షరి స్తోత్రం | Lingashtakam | Shiva Songs Telugu
snippet.description:
శివుని పాటలు - లింగాష్టకం - బిల్వాష్టకం- శివపంచాక్షరి స్తోత్రం | Lingashtakam | Shiva Bhakti Songs Telugu

Listen to divine శివుని భక్తి పాటలు (Shiva Bhakti Songs) 🙏 including powerful chants like Lingashtakam, Bilwashtakam, Shiva Panchakshara Stotram, Om Namah Shivaya, and Shiva Tandava Stotram dedicated to Lord Shiva.

These sacred stotras bring peace, strength, and spiritual energy, especially when listened to on Mondays.

✨ Popular chants included:
• Lingashtakam
• Bilwashtakam
• Shiva Panchakshara Stotram
• Om Namah Shivaya
• Shiva Tandava Stotram

✨ Benefits of listening:
• Removes negativity and stress
• Brings inner peace
• Improves focus and devotion
• Blessings of Lord Shiva

Perfect for Monday bhakti, meditation, and daily prayers.

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Suna Suna | Official Video | Krishna Cottage | Shreya Ghoshal | Anu Malik | Sohail Khan | Isha K
snippet.description:
✨ Experience the timeless emotion of Suna Suna Lamha Lamha full song from 'Krishna Cottage', beautifully sung by Shreya Ghoshal, now trending as a bridal entry song for 2026, credit goes to Nupur Sanon and Stebin Ben's wedding💍.

This iconic Bollywood love song, known for its deep emotions, is making a powerful comeback. Inspired by the viral Nupur Sanon wedding song, brides of 2026 are choosing 'Bepanah Pyar Hai Aaja' as their grand bridal entry song, turning an old Hindi song into a moment of elegance and beauty.

Take a sneak peek into this wedding-style version of 'Aisa Milan Phir Ho Na Ho' song and feel the magic where romance meets nostalgia. Whether you love it as a timeless Bollywood song or a couple's entry song, this romantic song brings a fresh and dreamy vibe.

🎶 Perfect for fans of Aaja Ve Sajna, Krishna cottage songs, or Shreya Ghoshal songs.

#Sunasuna #ShreyaGhosal #KrishnaCottageSongs #LoveSong #RomanticSong #aisamilan #bridalentry #bollywoodsongs #bollywoodmoviesong  #bepanahpyaarhaiaaja  #hindisong

Cette chanson d'amour emblématique de Bollywood, connue pour sa profondeur émotionnelle, fait un retour en force. Inspirées par le succès viral de la chanson lors du mariage de Nupur Sanon, les mariées de 2026 choisissent « Bepanah Pyar Hai Aaja » pour leur entrée solennelle, transformant ainsi un classique hindi en un moment d'élégance et de beauté.

Découvrez un extrait de cette version nuptiale de « Aisa Milan Phir Ho Na Ho » et laissez-vous emporter par la magie où romance et nostalgie se rencontrent. Que vous l'appréciiez comme un classique de Bollywood ou comme chanson d'entrée pour les mariés, ce titre romantique apporte une touche de fraîcheur et de rêve.

🎶 Parfait pour les fans d'Aaja Ve Sajna, de chansons de Krishna Cottage ou de chansons de Shreya Ghoshal.

hi.title: Suna Suna | Official Video | Krishna Cottage | Shreya Ghoshal | Anu Malik | Sohail Khan | Isha K
hi.description:
✨ फिल्म 'कृष्णा कॉटेज' के सदाबहार गीत 'सुना सुना लम्हा लम्हा' का आनंद लें, जिसे श्रेया घोषाल ने खूबसूरती से गाया है। यह गीत 2026 में दुल्हन की एंट्री के लिए ट्रेंडिंग सॉन्ग बन गया है। इसका श्रेय नूपुर सनोन और स्टेबिन बेन की शादी को जाता है।

गहरे भावों के लिए मशहूर यह आइकॉनिक बॉलीवुड प्रेम गीत एक बार फिर धूम मचा रहा है। नूपुर सनोन की वायरल वेडिंग सॉन्ग से प्रेरित होकर, 2026 की दुल्हनें 'बेपनाह प्यार है आजा' को अपनी ग्रैंड ब्राइडल एंट्री सॉन्ग के रूप में चुन रही हैं, जिससे एक पुराना हिंदी गीत एक भव्य और खूबसूरत पल में बदल रहा है।

'ऐसा मिलन फिर हो ना हो' के इस वेडिंग-स्टाइल वर्जन की एक झलक देखें और उस जादू को महसूस करें जहां रोमांस और पुरानी यादें एक साथ मिलती हैं। चाहे आप इसे एक सदाबहार बॉलीवुड गीत के रूप में पसंद करें या किसी जोड़े की एंट्री के गीत के रूप में, यह रोमांटिक गीत एक ताजगी और सपनों जैसा एहसास देता है।


🎶 आजा वे सजना, कृष्णा कॉटेज गाने, या श्रेया घोषाल गाने के प्रशंसकों के लिए बिल्कुल सही।

it.title: Suna Suna | Video ufficiale | Krishna Cottage | Shreya Ghoshal | Anu Malik | Sohail Khan | Isha K
it.description:
✨ Vivi l'emozione senza tempo di "Suna Suna Lamha Lamha", la canzone completa tratta da "Krishna Cottage", splendidamente cantata da Shreya Ghoshal, ora di tendenza come canzone d'ingresso per le spose nel 2026, grazie al matrimonio di Nupur Sanon e Stebin Ben 💍.

Questa iconica canzone d'amore di Bollywood, nota per la sua profonda emotività, sta tornando prepotentemente alla ribalta. Ispirate dalla canzone virale del matrimonio di Nupur Sanon, le spose del 2026 stanno scegliendo "Bepanah Pyar Hai Aaja" come canzone d'ingresso per il loro matrimonio, trasformando una vecchia canzone hindi in un momento di eleganza e bellezza.

Dai un'occhiata a questa versione in stile nuziale di "Aisa Milan Phir Ho Na Ho" e senti la magia dove il romanticismo incontra la nostalgia. Che tu la ami come una canzone senza tempo di Bollywood o come canzone d'ingresso per gli sposi, questa canzone romantica porta un'atmosfera fresca e sognante.


🎶 Perfetto per i fan di Aaja Ve Sajna, delle canzoni dei cottage di Krishna o delle canzoni di Shreya Ghoshal.

✨ Rasakan emosi abadi dari lagu lengkap Suna Suna Lamha Lamha dari 'Krishna Cottage', yang dinyanyikan dengan indah oleh Shreya Ghoshal, kini menjadi tren sebagai lagu pengiring pengantin untuk tahun 2026, berkat pernikahan Nupur Sanon dan Stebin Ben 💍.

Lagu cinta Bollywood ikonik ini, yang dikenal karena emosinya yang dalam, kembali dengan penuh semangat. Terinspirasi oleh lagu pernikahan Nupur Sanon yang viral, para pengantin tahun 2026 memilih 'Bepanah Pyar Hai Aaja' sebagai lagu pengiring pengantin mereka yang megah, mengubah lagu Hindi lama menjadi momen keanggunan dan keindahan.

Intip sekilas versi lagu 'Aisa Milan Phir Ho Na Ho' ala pernikahan ini dan rasakan keajaiban di mana romansa bertemu nostalgia. Baik Anda menyukainya sebagai lagu Bollywood abadi atau lagu pengiring pengantin pasangan, lagu romantis ini menghadirkan nuansa segar dan penuh impian.

de-DE.description:
✨ Erleben Sie die zeitlose Emotion des Liedes „Suna Suna Lamha Lamha“ aus dem Film „Krishna Cottage“, wunderschön gesungen von Shreya Ghoshal. Der Song ist jetzt als Einzugslied für Bräute im Jahr 2026 im Trend – ein Verdienst der Hochzeit von Nupur Sanon und Stebin Ben💍.

Dieser legendäre Bollywood-Liebessong, bekannt für seine tiefen Gefühle, feiert ein fulminantes Comeback. Inspiriert vom viralen Hochzeitssong von Nupur Sanon wählen Bräute des Jahres 2026 „Bepanah Pyar Hai Aaja“ als ihren großen Einzugssong und verwandeln so ein altes Hindi-Lied in einen Moment voller Eleganz und Schönheit.

Werfen Sie einen Blick auf diese Hochzeitsversion von „Aisa Milan Phir Ho Na Ho“ und spüren Sie die Magie, wo Romantik auf Nostalgie trifft. Ob als zeitloser Bollywood-Song oder als Einzugssong für Paare – dieser romantische Song verströmt eine frische und verträumte Atmosphäre.

🎶 Perfekt für Fans von Aaja Ve Sajna, Krishna Cottage-Liedern oder Shreya Ghoshal-Liedern.

✨ Experimente a emoção atemporal da música completa "Suna Suna Lamha Lamha" do filme "Krishna Cottage", lindamente interpretada por Shreya Ghoshal, que agora é tendência como música de entrada de noivas em 2026, graças ao casamento de Nupur Sanon e Stebin Ben💍.

Esta icônica canção de amor de Bollywood, conhecida por suas emoções profundas, está fazendo um retorno triunfal. Inspiradas pela música viral do casamento de Nupur Sanon, as noivas de 2026 estão escolhendo "Bepanah Pyar Hai Aaja" como sua grande música de entrada, transformando uma antiga canção hindi em um momento de elegância e beleza.

Dê uma olhada nesta versão para casamento da música "Aisa Milan Phir Ho Na Ho" e sinta a magia onde o romance encontra a nostalgia. Seja como uma canção atemporal de Bollywood ou como música de entrada de casal, esta canção romântica traz uma vibração fresca e onírica.

snippet.title: Akhya Trutiya Ra Aneka Mahima | ଅକ୍ଷୟ ତୃତୀୟାର ଅନେକ ମହିମା | Akhya Trutiya New Song | Namita Agrawal
snippet.description:
ଅକ୍ଷୟ ତୃତୀୟା କେବଳ ଏକ ତିଥି ନୁହେଁ, ଏହା ହେଉଛି ସୌଭାଗ୍ୟ ଓ ସମୃଦ୍ଧିର ଦିନ। ଏହି ଦିନ କୃଷକ ଭାଇ ନିଜ କ୍ଷେତରେ ଅକ୍ଷିମୁଠି ଅନୁକୂଳ କରେ ଏବଂ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ଚନ୍ଦନ ଯାତ୍ରା ମଧ୍ୟ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୁଏ। ନମିତା ଅଗ୍ରୱାଲଙ୍କ ସୁମଧୁର ସ୍ୱରରେ ଏହି ଭିଡିଓ ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଆପଣ ଜାଣିପାରିବେ କିପରି ଏହି ଦିନଟି ମଣିଷ ଜୀବନରେ ସୁଖ ଓ ଶାନ୍ତିର ବାର୍ତ୍ତା ବହି ଆଣିଥାଏ। ଆସନ୍ତୁ, ଏହି ପବିତ୍ର ଅବସରରେ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ଶରଣାପନ୍ନ ହୋଇ ନିଜ ଜୀବନକୁ ଧନ୍ୟ କରିବା।

#AkshayaTrutiyaAnekaMahima #AkshayaTrutiya #NamitaAgrawal #sidharthmusic #AkshayaTrutiyaMahima #OdiaPurana #OdiaBrataKatha #JagannathCulture #RathAnukula #AkshiMuthi #OdiaDevotional #NamitaAgrawalBhajan #DivineOdisha #NewOdiaBhajan

snippet.title: Shiva Stuti : आशुतोष शशांक शेखर | Ashutosh Shashank Shekhar Mantra | Shiv Mantra | शिव स्तुति
snippet.description:
Shiva Stuti : आशुतोष शशांक शेखर | Ashutosh Shashank Shekhar Mantra | Shiv Mantra | शिव स्तुति 

Song :- Ashutosh Shashank Shekhar
Singer :- Kamlesh Mishra, Deepak Rana
Lyrics :-  Traditional
Music :- Ankur Kapoor


🙏 **शिव स्तुति : आशुतोष शशांक शेखर | भोलेनाथ की दिव्य स्तुति** 🙏

यह अत्यंत पावन और मन को शांति देने वाली **शिव स्तुति "आशुतोष शशांक शेखर"** भगवान शिव की महिमा, करुणा और उनके दिव्य स्वरूप का सुंदर वर्णन करती है। इस स्तुति में भगवान भोलेनाथ को "आशुतोष" (जो तुरंत प्रसन्न हो जाते हैं) और "शशांक शेखर" (जिनके मस्तक पर चंद्रमा विराजमान है) के रूप में नमन किया गया है।

🕉️ **भगवान शिव** संपूर्ण सृष्टि के संहारक और पुनर्निर्माता हैं, जो अपने भक्तों के दुखों को हरकर उन्हें सुख और शांति प्रदान करते हैं।
🕉️ यह स्तुति भक्ति, श्रद्धा और आध्यात्मिक ऊर्जा से भरपूर है, जो हर भक्त के हृदय को शिवमय कर देती है।

✨ **इस स्तुति की विशेषताएं:**

* मधुर और शांतिदायक संगीत
* भगवान शिव के दिव्य रूप का सुंदर वर्णन
* मन को शांति और सकारात्मक ऊर्जा देने वाली रचना
* ध्यान और साधना के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त

📿 **कब सुनें यह शिव स्तुति?**

* सुबह की शुरुआत में भगवान शिव का आशीर्वाद पाने के लिए
* सोमवार के दिन विशेष रूप से
* ध्यान, पूजा और आराधना के समय
* तनाव और चिंता को दूर करने के लिए

🌙 **"हर हर महादेव" का जाप जीवन में सुख, शांति और समृद्धि लाता है।** 🌙

🔔 ऐसे ही और शिव भजन एवं स्तुति सुनने के लिए हमारे चैनल को **Subscribe** करें और Bell Icon जरूर दबाएं।

🙏 **हर हर महादेव! जय शिव शंकर!** 🙏

#ShivStuti #AshutoshShashankShekhar #Mahadev #Bholenath #ShivBhajan #DevotionalSongs #HarHarMahadev #ShivMantra #Bhakti

snippet.description:
“Me Thera Pyaar” – Official Music Video

A soulful romantic music video that explores love, emotions, and connection through cinematic storytelling. Experience a blend of heartfelt music and visually rich storytelling that brings this love story to life.

Watch till the end and feel the emotion behind every frame.

---

Credits

Singer: Anas Baadshah, Marriam Zeeshan
Music Video By: Mohammed Noushad

꧁༺𝐁𝐀𝐀𝐃𝐒𝐇𝐀𝐇'𝐒 𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐓𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐒༻꧂

|| ᴀɴᴛɪ-ᴘɪʀᴀᴄʏ ᴡᴀʀɴɪɴɢ ||  
ᴛʜɪꜱ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ ɪꜱ ᴄᴏᴘʏʀɪɢʜᴛᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ❝𝐁𝐀𝐀𝐃𝐒𝐇𝐀𝐇'𝐒 𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐓𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐒❞ . ᴀɴʏ ᴜɴᴀᴜᴛʜᴏʀɪᴢᴇᴅ ʀᴇᴘʀᴏᴅᴜᴄᴛɪᴏɴ, ʀᴇᴅɪꜱᴛʀɪʙᴜᴛɪᴏɴ ᴏʀ ʀᴇ-ᴜᴘʟᴏᴀᴅ ɪꜱ ꜱᴛʀɪᴄᴛʟʏ ᴘʀᴏʜɪʙɪᴛᴇᴅ. ʟᴇɢᴀʟ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴏɴ ᴡɪʟʟ ʙᴇ ᴛᴀᴋᴇɴ ᴀɢᴀɪɴꜱᴛ ᴛʜᴏꜱᴇ ᴡʜᴏ ᴠɪᴏʟᴀᴛᴇ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄᴏᴘʏʀɪɢʜᴛ ᴏꜰ ᴛʜᴇ ꜱᴀᴍᴇ

snippet.title: Kannumuzhi 8K Video | Mask | Vetri Maaran | GV Prakash Kumar | Kavin | Andrea J | Ruhani | Vikarnan
snippet.description:
Watch the stunning “Kannumuzhi” 8K Video Song from Mask, featuring Kavin, Andrea J, and Ruhani.

Composed by GV Prakash Kumar and directed by Vikarnan, this song delivers a perfect blend of melody, visuals, and cinematic brilliance, backed by the creative vision associated with Vetri Maaran.

🎬 Movie: Mask
⭐ Starring: Kavin, Andrea J, Ruhani
🎶 Music: GV Prakash Kumar
🎬 Director: Vikarnan

Enjoy this mesmerizing 8K experience filled with music and emotion.

#Kannumuzhi #Mask #Kavin #Andrea #Ruhani #GVPrakashKumar #TamilSongs #8KVideo #RomanticSongs #Trending

Connect with T-Series Tamil: 👉 http://bit.ly/SubscribeToTseriesTamil

snippet.description:
Main Rang Sharbaton Ka Reprise | Arijit Singh | Shahid Kapoor | Ileana D'Cruz | Romantic Song

Song Credits:
Song: Main Rang Sharbaton Ka
Movie: Phata Poster Nikhla Hero
Singer: Arijit Singh
Music Director: Pritam
Lyricist: Irshad Kamil

Lyrics:
Khwaab hai tu neend hoon main
Dono milen raat bane
Roz yehi maangun dua
Teri meri baat bane

Main rang sharbaton ka
Tu meethe ghaat ka paani
Main rang sharbaton ka
Tu meethe ghaat ka paani
Mujhe khud mein ghol de to
Mere yaar baat ban jaani

Main rang sharbaton ka
Tu meethe ghaat ka paani
Main rang sharbaton ka
Tu meethe ghaat ka paani

Tere khalayon se
Tere khayalon tak
Mera toh hai aana jaana
Mera toh jo bhi hai
Tu hi tha tu hi hai
Baaki jahan hai begaana

Tum ek musafir ho
Main koi raah anjaani
Tum ek musafir ho
Main koi raah anjaani
Man chaha mod de to
Mere yaar baat ban jaani

Rang sharbaton ka
Tu meethe ghaat ka paani...
Main rang sharbaton ka
Tu meethe ghaat ka paani...
Mujhe khud mein ghol de to
Mere yaar baat ban jaani
Rang sharbaton ka
Tu meethe ghaat ka paani...

snippet.title: Akshaya Tritiya Powerful Kanakadhara Stothram Tamil | Lakshmi Kalyanam And Deepavadive Thirumagale
snippet.description:
🎵 Click here to listen to your favorite Songs:

00:00:00 Kanakadhara Stothram In Tamil
00:26:45 Lakshmi Kalyanam
00:33:11 Amma Endral
00:38:49 Deepavadive Thirumagale
00:45:00 Om Jai Sri Jagan
00:55:43 Thirukkaram Naangu 

Welcome to our Tamil Devotional Channel, your ultimate destination for soulful and uplifting Tamil devotional songs. Dive into the divine with our carefully curated collections designed to inspire and bring peace to your soul every day of the week.

Daily Devotional Songs:
* Monday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Tuesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Wednesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Thursday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Friday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Saturday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Sunday Tamil Devotional Songs

Special Devotional Collections:
* Shiva Tamil Devotional Songs: Celebrate the power and grace of Lord Shiva.
* Vishnu Tamil Devotional Songs: Immerse in the blessings of Lord Vishnu.
* Muruga Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke the valor and blessings of Lord Muruga.
* Hanuman Tamil Devotional Songs: Feel the strength and devotion of Lord Hanuman.
* Amman Tamil Devotional Songs: Honor the divine mother in her various forms.
* Saibaba Tamil Devotional Songs: Seek the blessings of Shirdi Sai Baba.
* Balaji Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship Lord Venkateswara with these soulful songs.
* Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Attract prosperity with hymns for Goddess Lakshmi.
* Devi Tamil Devotional Songs: Praise the supreme goddess Devi in her many avatars.
* Ganesh Tamil Devotional Songs: Start your day with prayers to Lord Ganesha.

Special Occasions and Deities:
* Amavasai Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs for the new moon day rituals.
* Pradosham Tamil Devotional Songs: Hymns for the auspicious Pradosham period.
* Ashta Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs dedicated to the eight forms of Goddess Lakshmi.
* Vinayagar Tamil Devotional Songs: Devotions for the remover of obstacles, Lord Vinayagar.
* Ganapathi Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke blessings from Lord Ganapathi.
* Surya Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship the Sun God, Surya, with these melodies.
* Sani Tamil Devotional Songs: Appease Lord Sani with these devotional tracks.
* Guru Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs to honor Guru and seek his wisdom.
* Perumal Tamil Devotional Songs: Devote to Lord Perumal with these spiritual songs.
* Navagraha Tamil Devotional Songs: Balance your energies with songs for the nine planets.

Subscribe now and join our spiritual journey. Like, share, and hit the bell icon to stay updated with our latest devotional uploads. May these divine songs bring peace, prosperity, and positivity to your life.

🎤 Singer: Saindhavi
✍🏻 Lyrics: Sembiah,S.P.Devarajan
🎼 Music: Krishnan
🎬 Label: Abirami Audio Recording Private Limited

snippet.title: Insta Keeda |  इंस्टा कीड़ा | Official Adivasi Video | Kaushik Vasava & Pradnya Jadhav #adivasisong
snippet.description:
🎬 Jay Johar, Jay Yaha Mogi Mata
The video opens with vibrant Adivasi village visuals, setting a lively cultural tone. The lead characters are introduced in a natural, festive environment, blending tradition with a modern “Insta” vibe.

As the song begins, energetic dance sequences unfold in colorful outdoor locations, featuring group choreography and expressive movements. Close-up shots capture emotions and chemistry between the lead artists, while wide cinematic frames highlight the beauty of the surroundings.

The concept revolves around today’s social media influence (“Insta Keeda”) mixed with Adivasi lifestyle, showing fun, love, and youthful energy. Dynamic camera movements, slow-motion shots, and stylish cuts enhance the visual appeal.

The video concludes with a high-energy group performance, leaving a strong cultural and entertaining impact.

Director: Pawan Bhosle (PB)
Producer: Pawan Bhosle (PB)
Choreography: Sandy Pradhan
Singers: Kaushik Vasava & Pradnya Jadhav
Lyrics: Vishal Shewale
Recording: Ritesh Kirade (RK)
DOP: Pawan Bhosle (PB) 7566340698
Cinematography: PS Bhosle
Cameramen: Aakesh Thakur & Jiten Khedkar
DI & Color Edit: Pawan Bhosle
Featuring: Nanu Tadvi, Raja Jadhav (RJD) & Saru Vasava
BGM Boys:
Nix Axi, Gopal Dancer, Pradeep Roshan Brahamne & Sagar
BGM Girls:
Axita, Sonu, Piyu & Poonam

*****Special Thanks***

Dharasing Brahmnae ( Sarpnch ) 
Brahmnae Femily ( Falati )
Onkar Khedkar Rahul barde Ravin bhosle

Location : Falati and Raikhed Mankui

snippet.title: Lata Asha Bangla Gaan | Lata Mangeshkar & Asha Bhosle Bengali Songs | Audio Jukebox
snippet.description:
Enjoy the timeless magic of Lata Mangeshkar & Asha Bhosle Bengali songs in this specially curated jukebox 🎧✨ 
Lata Asha Bangla Gaan | Lata Mangeshkar & Asha Bhosle Bengali Songs | Audio Jukebox

This collection brings together some of the most iconic old Bangla gaan by Lata Mangeshkar and Asha Bhosle, two legendary voices who have shaped the golden era of Indian and Bengali music. Their soulful renditions continue to captivate listeners across generations.

From romantic melodies to evergreen classics, this jukebox is perfect for fans of old Bengali songs, retro Bangla music, and vintage musical gems. These songs remain highly popular across YouTube search and suggested playlists due to their nostalgia and emotional depth.

Whether you are revisiting old memories or discovering these classics for the first time, this playlist offers a rich and soothing musical journey.

🎶 Press play and relive the golden era of Bangla music.
